title: cordia toqueve
intro: Cordia toqueve, also known as Mexican coral tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The bark and roots of Cordia toqueve are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cordia toqueve include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antispasmodic and to treat skin conditions. Cordia toqueve can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture to make herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
